德國傳媒報道，多蒙特在疫情下面臨高達1億歐元(約9400萬港元)虧蝕，管理層正考慮出售球星套現填氹，包括去年夏天向曼聯標價1.08億鎊(約11.4億港元)嘅查頓辛祖，由於係拋售套現，價錢自然有商量，問題係曼聯仲有冇興趣？

德國《Sport1》報道，多蒙特今季不但戰績未如理想，業績同樣見紅，疫情下更令虧蝕情況惡化，據報道今季將面臨1億歐元虧蝕，為平衡帳目，最直接方法係賣球員，因此該隊將查頓辛祖重新上架。

上季開始，曼聯早已表達對查頓辛祖收購興趣，多蒙特一直吊高嚟賣，即使爆發疫情都拒絕減價，堅持售價1.08億鎊，曼聯多次還價都被拒絕，直至去年夏天轉會窗關閉前曼聯終極報價9000萬鎊被拒後，交易宣布拉倒，辛祖繼續留喺多蒙特。

今季多蒙特成績倒退，辛祖表現亦回落，今季上陣23場僅入6球13次助攻，反觀曼聯依家萬眾一心衝擊英超冠軍，呢個時候多蒙特話想賣辛祖，曼聯仲刮唔刮佢？

山曹唔覺意做隊長 列奧斯：他很自豪
2021年2月1日週一 下午1:33

【Now Sports】英格蘭快翼山曹日前意外地當上多蒙特的隊長，馬高列奧斯透露這名小將十分自豪。
多蒙特上周六德甲鬥奧格斯堡，幾經辛苦才以3:1反敗為勝，終止3場不勝的頹勢。當隊長馬高列奧斯於84分鐘被換出時，為蜜蜂兵團攻入反超前入球的山曹（Jadon Sancho）令人意外地戴上隊長臂章。 根據德國《圖片報》報道，原來山曹做隊長純屬意外。當列奧斯把臂章交予附近的山曹時，後者原本應該把它送到中堅侯姆斯手上，但反而自己戴上了。不過，山曹也沒有辜負這臂章，之後助攻助守，表現非常出色。 列奧斯賽後對山曹首次做隊長表示：「這對他來說是一種榮耀。他回到更衣室時，感覺非常自豪。」 20歲的山曹去年夏天差點加盟曼聯，但兩家球會未能就1.2億歐元的轉會費達成協議。離隊不成後，他在季初表現明顯受影響。

Borussia Dortmund is currently in a difficult phase, in addition to the ongoing Corona crisis, it is especially sporty, anything but optimal. Many BVB professionals are not really in top form at the moment either, in the European Championship year of all places. National coach Joachim Löw has now commented on the BVB stars and their prospects for the EURO.

In an interview with the “BILD Zeitung”, the national coach also commented on BVB captain Marco Reus, who has had a very mixed season so far. According to Löw, Reus had “problems with the pace” for a long time after his tendinitis, the 60-year-old sees a positive trend and has last seen “sparkling” and “good moments” with the attacking midfielder. However, Löw left it open whether Reus is a candidate for the EM next summer: "We will continue to monitor his development closely and hope that he can continue the positive trend."

In the case of Nico Schulz, however, Löw indicated that he would no longer make the leap onto the EM train: "Of course it's a difficult situation for him now because he doesn't play that often and he lacks the rhythm."

"He's a leader who can get everyone involved"

Things look much better at Emre Can, however. The defensive all-rounder also has to struggle with fluctuations in performance again and again, but is apparently set by the national coach: “He's incredibly versatile. He also has an outstanding mentality, he is a leader who can get everyone involved. "

With Julian Brandt, however, a lot depends on how the high-end technician presents himself in the coming months: “Jule is now in the prime football age and can do things in training that I haven't seen for a long time. He has great talent and is always good for surprising moments. I wish him that he consistently brings the performance onto the pitch, then he will help every team. "
